cases.title: 涉汉坦病毒疫情邮轮人员开始疏散转运
MV Hondius 邮轮安第斯型聚集疫情（更新）
cases.summary: On 2 May 2026, WHO received notification from the National IHR Focal Point of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland (hereafter referred to as the United Kingdom) regarding a cluster of severe acute respiratory illness, including two deaths and one critically ill passenger, aboard a Dutch-flagged cruise ship. Since the last Disease Outbreak News was published on 4 May, three of the suspected cases were confirmed, and one additional confirmed case was reported. As of 8 May, a total of eight cases (six confirmed and two probable cases), including three deaths (two confirmed an…

cases.title: 台湾省 CDC 周报：北部地区出现 1 例汉坦病毒重症病例
cases.summary: 病患为中年男性，疑似职业暴露相关。台湾省 CDC 提醒农林从业者注意防鼠卫生。台湾省每年报告汉坦相关病例约 0-3 例，属于偶发型。

cases.title: 世卫组织就与游轮有关的汉坦病毒病例采取应对行动
瑞士 BAG 通报：阿尔卑斯山地区 1 例 Puumala 型死亡病例
cases.summary: 瑞士联邦公共卫生办公室（BAG）通报，伯尔尼州一名 60 岁男性因 Puumala 型汉坦病毒感染并发肺综合征死亡。当地森林啮齿动物种群密度近期偏高。

cases.title: MV Hondius 邮轮安第斯型聚集疫情
cases.summary: On 2 May 2026, WHO received notification from the National International Health Regulations (2005) (IHR) Focal Point of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland (hereafter referred to as the United Kingdom) regarding a cluster of severe acute respiratory illness, including two deaths and one critically ill passenger, aboard a Dutch-flagged cruise ship. On 2 May 2026, laboratory testing conducted in South Africa confirmed hantavirus infection in one patient who is critically ill and in intensive care. On 3 May, one additional death was reported. A further three suspected cases…
